creator: freebsd@kumba.dev
text:
Created attachment 245134
Patch to update port to squid-6.3

(In reply to Robert Clausecker from comment #6)
Yup, I worked that much out.  I wasn't sure how Pavel got the additional translations in if they weren't installed.  Assumed there was some trick somewhere that I was missing.

Attaching an updated patch for squid-6.3.  Like the earlier one, the pkg-plist needs some fixups, but this gets most of the way there.
